title: Modern Tetra
description: Modern Tetra module textures. Enhanced shading that tries to match modern MC's tools and weapons.
body:
[Tetra](https://modrinth.com/mod/tetra) is a wonderful mod about creating modular tools, much like Tinker's Construct; however, Tetra's textures I feel are rather outdated, using assets from before the 1.14 texture update.

![Default Tetra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c124088a9715095994676d6d50865e8e4e47aa6.png)

Using [Ron0](https://modrinth.com/user/ron0)'s shading in Textrapack I fully reshaped, reshaded, and moved all but a few of Tetra's tool and weapon modules. They look better than ever and now fit nearly perfectly into any modern version of your game!

![Modern Tetra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e7821a15215a508af9a5e4e071281f1eafe018b.png)

I recommend using this resource pack alongside [Textrapack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/textrapack).
Make sure to load Modern Tetra _above_/_after_ Textrapack, otherwise not all weapons and tools will be updated correctly.

This resource pack makes direct use of some binding/wrap/handle textures by [Ron0](https://modrinth.com/user/ron0). The vast majority of colors and default binding textures are by Ron0. This is so _all_ modules have a stylistic synergy even though I didn't make some myself.

All usage of [Ron0](https://modrinth.com/user/ron0)'s assets are done with permission.

To do:
- If and when Tetra gets a modules update, I'll update these textures accordingly.
- If an addon mod comes out that adds stuff I like I'll do the same.

## I won't do:
- Art of Forging (deprecated)
- Tetra Delight (use Tetracelium + Tetra Delight)

Feel free to use this in modpacks as long as Ron's Textrapack allows it.
